title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 11th February 2026 | TV5 News

recommendations.price: 48-50 range; decisive cross of 54-55 for big move
recommendations.note: Buy with patience; good valuation, renewables demand strong
recommendations.detail: Definitely buy at a decent valuation; results came with top line sustained and ~Rs 300 cr profit even after removing a one-off. Renewable space has continuous demand, so no fear. Stock will consolidate in the 48-50 range and rise slowly given high float (promoter only ~12%, public+institutions ~88%); a decisive cross of 54-55 can bring a big move.

recommendations.note: Hold and add on declines; better-performing PSU bank
recommendations.detail: Definitely hold and add on declines. Average whenever it comes to Rs 140 and below as it is one of the better-performing PSU banks. It was recommended strongly cum-dividend earlier around 90.

Definitely hold; the holder (bought at 294, now ~270) is not in a big loss since the stock is near its 52-week high. Avail the second interim dividend (record date 12th). The stock will likely attempt 310-320 once, where the position can be trimmed. It is more of a dividend-paying stock with long-run capital appreciation too.

Post-results it went to 17,000-plus, corrected, and is now around 15,200. Accumulate slowly from here; strong support has developed at 14,600-700, so buy whenever it comes closer to 15,000. As the country's largest carmaker it sustains profitability and margins and improved quarter-on-quarter.

recommendations.note: Buy on dips into the 600-640 support band
recommendations.detail: Buy on declines. It bottomed around 540-550 and is rising back in steps. Strong support now is in a wide band of about 600 to 640; when it comes into that range, buy then.

recommendations.note: Long-term buy only; better to enter after ex-rights
recommendations.detail: If you have a long-term view, definitely buy, but no spectacular short-term gains. The stock corrected from ~800 to ~600 and the result was disappointing (slipped into a loss). With a proposed rights issue it will trade cum-rights, so it is better to think and take it after ex-rights.

recommendations.note: Avoid; weak bottom line, only a retailer
recommendations.detail: No positivity here. It is more of a retailer (not a manufacturer), so margins won't improve much, especially as e-commerce is taking sales even in fast-moving electrical goods. Profit came modestly (~Rs 29 cr) despite some top-line growth. If anything, exit even on a rally toward ~189.

recommendations.note: Avoid for now; lower-top lower-bottom pattern
recommendations.detail: For now avoid; it should be bought only on declines. The stock has formed lower-top, lower-bottom continuously for the last two quarters, so it won't jump easily. Maybe it reclaims 1,000 again; buy only if it crosses 1,000.
